name: AMIDEAST Lebanon
audience: Lebanese + Palestinian/Syrian refugees seeking international degrees
partnership_notes: EducationUSA gatekeeper; co-host webinars and fee waivers for advisees

name: Unite Lebanon Youth Project (ULYP)
audience: Palestinian/Syrian refugees and low-income Lebanese youth
partnership_notes: Bridge cohorts ready for scholarship pitches; offer fee waivers and tailored bootcamps

name: Lebanese Association for Scientific Research (LASeR)
audience: North Lebanon STEM/business students incl. select refugees
partnership_notes: Co-fund small cohort and use mentor network for pre-arrival readiness

name: LIFE (Lebanese International Finance Executives)
audience: Lebanese finance/econ/data students in Lebanon and abroad
partnership_notes: Co-brand graduate scholarships and host virtual career panels with diaspora mentors

name: Anera (American Near East Refugee Aid) – Lebanon
audience: Palestinian and Syrian refugees plus vulnerable Lebanese youth
partnership_notes: Bridge vocational graduates into degree pathways with donor-backed scholarships
